name: hugging-face-datasets
description: Reads dataset splits and per-split sizes from the Hugging Face dataset-viewer REST API. Read-only; an optional user access token unlocks gated and private datasets.

risk.read: external Hugging Face dataset-viewer API read of dataset split/size metadata; an optional access token unlocks gated/private dataset reads
risk.approval: none; read-only, no obviously-safe reverse-ETL writes
